node_definitions.description: Simulates delivering a notification email with optional body content.

ui.help_text: Deliver a notification-style email from the workflow canvas.

node_definitions.description: Surfaces human-readable text in the run log stream.

ui.help_text: Expose the final human-readable output in the UI.

node_definitions.description: Injects literal text into the workflow.

outputs.description: The provided text payload.

ui.help_text: Provide starter text for a flow or quick runtime smoke test.

node_definitions.description: References a source table from the workflow DuckDB catalog.

outputs.description: Resolved workflow table reference.

ui.help_text: Read a named source table from the workflow DuckDB file.

node_definitions.description: Declares a workflow-local table schema and emits a downstream table reference.

outputs.description: Declared workflow table reference.

ui.help_text: Define a workflow-local DuckDB table shape before rows are written.

node_definitions.description: Persists incoming text or table-backed data into a workflow DuckDB table.

inputs.description: Renderable text row content or a compatible table reference.

ui.help_text: Write a simple sink table in the workflow DuckDB file.

node_definitions.description: Creates a workflow-local DuckDB view that reshapes staged tables into merge-ready outputs.

inputs.description: Workflow-local staging table reference that will be queried by inline SQL.
Collection of workflow-local table references to transform one table at a time.

outputs.description: Workflow-local transformed table reference backed by a DuckDB view.
Collection of transformed table references, preserving one output per input table.

ui.help_text: Use inline DuckDB SQL to reshape staging tables into merge-ready workflow views.

node_definitions.description: Iterates a table reference collection and emits a mapped collection for downstream collection-aware nodes.

inputs.description: Ordered collection of table references to filter or remap one by one.

outputs.description: Mapped table reference collection after per-table iteration and renaming.

ui.help_text: Iterate over a table collection and remap each table reference in sequence.

node_definitions.description: Runs a tiny built-in Rust text transform.

outputs.description: Transformed text output.

ui.help_text: A starter compute node for the first vertical slice.

node_definitions.description: References a Dolt repository and branch for downstream sync and export nodes.

outputs.description: Dolt repo reference and checkout metadata.

ui.help_text: Select a Dolt repository and branch.

node_definitions.description: Reads the last successful checkpoint for a repo and branch.

outputs.description: Checkpoint context with previous commit metadata.

ui.help_text: Read checkpoint state for incremental Dolt ingestion.

node_definitions.description: Synchronizes a Dolt repo and resolves current/previous commit range metadata.

outputs.description: Synced Dolt repo reference with range metadata.

ui.help_text: Sync a Dolt repo before computing changed tables.

node_definitions.description: Computes a scoped changed-table manifest from an upstream Dolt commit range.

inputs.description: Synced Dolt repo reference with resolved commit range metadata.

outputs.description: Changed-table manifest reference plus schema-drift metadata.

ui.help_text: Compute a manifest of changed Dolt tables.

node_definitions.description: Exports whole Dolt tables into a bundle directory for downstream raw landing.

inputs.description: Upstream Dolt repo or manifest dataset that resolves the export scope.

outputs.description: Directory reference for exported files.
Table manifest with exported source tables.

ui.help_text: Export Dolt tables to a file bundle.

node_definitions.description: Exports Dolt table deltas into a bundle directory for incremental loads.

inputs.description: Changed-table manifest from Dolt Change Manifest.

outputs.description: Directory reference for exported delta files.

ui.help_text: Export changed rows from a Dolt manifest.

node_definitions.description: Loads a Dolt export bundle into workflow-local DuckDB staging tables.

inputs.description: Dolt dump or diff export bundle.

outputs.description: Legacy single loaded table reference.
Collection of loaded table references.

ui.help_text: Load exported files into DuckDB staging tables.

node_definitions.description: Merges transformed staging tables into durable workflow target tables.

inputs.description: Legacy single table ready for merge.
Collection of tables ready for merge.

outputs.description: Legacy durable merged table reference.
Durable merged table collection.

ui.help_text: Merge curated staging tables into durable targets.

node_definitions.description: Applies post-merge validation rules and gates whether checkpoint advancement may continue.

inputs.description: Legacy single durable table reference ready for validation.
Collection of durable table references ready for validation.

outputs.description: The same durable table reference enriched with quality gate metadata.
The same durable table collection enriched with quality gate metadata.

ui.help_text: Run post-merge quality gates before checkpoint advancement.

node_definitions.description: Persists checkpoint advancement after successful merge and quality gates.

inputs.description: Legacy single table whose metadata should advance checkpoint state.
Collection of tables whose metadata should advance checkpoint state.

outputs.description: Pass-through single table reference enriched with checkpoint write metadata.
Pass-through table collection enriched with checkpoint write metadata.

ui.help_text: Persist checkpoint state after successful processing.
